# SMV - Sumadhwa Vijaya Web Application

## Project Overview
Web-based application for displaying Sumadhwa Vijaya (Sanskrit biographical epic of Madhvacharya) with multi-language support.

## Technology Stack
- HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (vanilla)
- No build tools required
- Static site ready for deployment

## Features
- Sanskrit sloka display with transliteration
- Multi-language support: Sanskrit, Kannada, Telugu
- Navigation by cantos (sargas)
- Search functionality
- Responsive design

## Project Status
✅ Project structure created
⏳ Core functionality in development
